title: ecc: sign_digest copies 128-byte stack buf to heap Vec
description: ecc.rs sign_digest allocates a 128-byte stack array buf, writes the signature into it via FFI, then calls buf[..sig_len].to_vec() to return the result. The copy is unnecessary: pre-allocate a Vec<u8> with capacity 128, pass as_mut_ptr() to the FFI call, then truncate to sig_len. Eliminates a 128-byte memcopy on every ECDSA sign call.
